summary.claim_text: R13-3 finds `degrade_only_signal_safe` as a conservative secondary DeiT-Tiny support point: mean Top-1 delta -0.0360 pp, worst-seed delta -0.0800 pp, and minimum modeled EDP improvement 6.901% against the same-scope Lightening-style reference.

architecture_join_rows.dataset_or_split: ImageNet-style architecture sweep, patch16 224, tokens=197, batch_size=1
